title: Retouched - Enhanced Minecraft Experience
description: A mod that expands (and will expand even more in the future) Minecraft.
body:
# ![RETOUCHED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09ffa3d2c6fdaff50e6e2793d71d385e15ee975.png)



Hey! How are you? Well, as it stands this mod adds some biomes, block and wood sets, a new set of weapons, and much else you'll discover.
The goal of this mod is to expand every aspect of Minecraft: from the Nether to ice to Caves...
I hope and think that in the future this goal will be achieved. So if this project inspires you, download it and follow me on YouTube and Instagram, where there will be mini-videos and posts with future updates. 
But most importantly, [join my community on Discord](https://discord.gg/3yMvGnXHZ8), where you can find news, old and new updates, spoilers for upcoming updates, help, bug report, preview updates, betas and much more!



<details>
<summary>v0.2.0: Quality Update!</summary>
  
## Some images of improvements:

![Chalcopyrite (ex flate)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a370ee286f49b79cbad6c75961624106f4e5d0e.png)

![Maple redesign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f560a60548ef77d36f9c11dbaaecfe5434a0ddf.png)

![Sapphire redesign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d7bb09144ca70da890dc388e8fee4d96f8a3602.png)

And that's not all of course, there's much more to discover!

</details>

<details>
<summary>v0.1.0: CULINARY DELIGHTS UPDATE!</summary>
v0.1.0: CULINARY DELIGHTS UPDATE!

**New fruits and foods**
![New Fruits and more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/489cad4bc3449dea20ae12472195030f86829eec.png)
- Tomato, garlic, peach, pear, prune and more spawn in plants and trees in warm biomes
- Sugar cane bale, is a innovative way to organize your sugar canes
- The wooden plate, needs to do some recipes

**New blocks**
![New organizations blocks ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c45b151fe5959342fc1d3c4ef962c46183276e_0.webp)
- With 9 of various foods and more (magma creams, salks, peaches, golden apples, carrots...) you can create  a **crate**
- Only for melon, you need only four of this to create a crate
- Enchanted Golden Apples Crate, is animated on the top
- Honeycomb Crate is animated on side and top

**New structure**
![Welcoming Countryhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53abe14c8488667fda0d1cc30374b0bf5b4e6beb.png)
- This structure is called "welcoming countryhouse" and here you can found a bed, food and a smoker
- Spawn in various type of forest, plains and... plains
- It's rare enaugh

**New wooden plates**
![New wooden plates with foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/121c6d199ca14b1ff95f72ca0496be3b7ebb8f85.png)
- You can craft the wooden plate with wood and a bowl
- Then, you can place in crafting table, the wooden plate with variuos type of foods:
> - two baked potatoes and one cooked courgette
> - two prunes and one red berry
> - two cooked porkchops and one slice of garlic (with one of garlic for nine slice of garlic)
> - three carrots
> - three tomatoes
> - one of prune, pear, peach and apricot

**Now after cooked a rotten flesh, you obtain a leather**

![Now after cooked a rotten flesh you obtain a leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c15fe2b1acecf6aa4adf5ea543cc688dc17e38.png)



</details>



<details>
<summary>Warnings!</summary>

- Decorative blocks can only be created using STONECUTTER
- The various types of vanilla wood cannot be mixed in recipes with the mod's woods.

</details>


<details>
<summary>FAQ and info</summary>

- Can I repost in  my website/app, to bring profit to me,or take (copy) parts of this mod?
NO, you can't.
- If you use my mod in your modpack and make the modpack public, let me know (just out of personal curiosity) in the comments, on YT or wherever you like, and give me credit.
- You can find help, info, bug report, feeedback and news in the [Discord community](https://discord.gg/3yMvGnXHZ8).

</details>


## [Join the Discord here](https://discord.gg/3yMvGnXHZ8)


Subscribe to my YT:[My YT channel](https://www.youtube.com/@thepintus15)

if you are interested, click here for Insta: [My Insta](https://www.instagram.com/pintusvision?igsh=MWh4N214Ym0zOWE2eQ==)

(Low quality and not final)
[Click here for the mod trailer](https://youtu.be/dzw7q2o9Yus?si=LyiwkbHUOwL1YrLe)

### HAVE FUN!
